data.body: Brainstorm session created this epic and enriched epic 87e9-0bc8 in the same dialogue — 87e9-0bc8 scope broadened to add the commands.test_file_runner companion key consumed by this epic's per-file gate path. Epic 9d88-6525 closed as superseded (see reason field). 1083-fb3d received an in-place SC addition for the CI-fallback escape hatch (documented fallback while local test execution encounters upstream Claude Code tool bugs).
